extraction.one_line_summary: BERNAL Egan attacked inside 3km on Gotthard Pass, distanced DENNIS by 23 seconds to extend GC lead before decisive TT stage.
tactical_patterns: BERNAL attacked sub-3km on summit finish knowing TT deficit required banking time before Stage 8 ITT.
BAHR/Merida paced DENNIS in pursuit but couldn't close gap, revealing team TT preparation over summit support.
Movistar set pace entering final climb but couldn't sustain to defend BERNAL's lead, ceding to individual attack.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: attacked decisively inside 3km despite knowing he'd lose time in upcoming ITT, showing aggressive GC defense.
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: dropped back from following BERNAL to pace DENNIS instead, revealing team hierarchy prioritization.
rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: neutral: required team pacing to limit losses on climb, confirming TT specialization over climbing strength.
rider_signals.FRANK Mathias: positive: local rider survived solo to near-final 10km after attacking breakaway, showing superior climbing depth.
